scripts.build: cd ../.. && ./zig/zig build codegen && ./zig/zig build scan -- examples/ecommerce-ts/handlers/ --manifest=generated/manifest.json && PATH=examples/ecommerce-ts/node_modules/.bin:$PATH tsx adapters/typescript.ts generated/manifest.json generated/dispatch.generated.ts
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently 'tsx ../../generated/dispatch.generated.ts /tmp/tiger-web.sock' 'sleep 1 && cd ../.. && ./zig/zig build run -- --sidecar=/tmp/tiger-web.sock'
